div1.entryFree: Worldlings, as it seems, == people of this our world, men: poor deer, thou makest a testament as w. do, giving thy sum of more to that which had too much, As II, 1, 48. deliver them like men of this world. A foutre for the world and w. base; I speak of Africa and golden joys, H4B V, 3, 103 (Pistol's speech).
